SULLIVAN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS LOCKE LORD, LLP AND ERIC STIFF -- THE COURT ASSIGNED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE RICHARD ULMER IN DEPT. 306. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPT. 306 BY 4:30 PM TODAY VIA THE EMAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL REGARDING SCHEDULING OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COURTROOM TELEPHONE NUMBER OF (415) 551-3846 WAS ALSO PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES AT TRIAL CALL. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON MAR-10-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL FOR THE NEXT TRIAL CALL. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE.
